T18.command: python -m unittest discover -s tests -p "test_*.py"; pio run -e mergetesting_care_demo_face240; pio run -e mergetesting_care_demo_face240 -t upload --upload-port COM19; python tools/send_robot_command.py --device-id xiaoan_robot_01 expression caring; python tools/send_robot_command.py --device-id xiaoan_robot_01 tts --text "测试"; python tools/send_robot_command.py --device-id xiaoan_robot_01 motion move_out_of_dock; python tools/send_robot_command.py --device-id xiaoan_robot_01 local care_01
T18.summary: OpenClaw Step 33 hardware preflight completed with a dedicated mergetesting_care_demo_face240 env: face240+motor+speaker+/control enabled, camera/mic disabled. Full unit discovery ran 843 tests OK; care-demo env build/upload passed. Server logged camera=cam_off, display.expression caring ack ok, audio.play_tts mock ack ok, motion.execute ack ok, motion.completed success, and audio.play_local care_01 ack ok. User confirmed expression/TTS observation before motion. Follow-up motor calibration found the old 0.2/2cm/500ms envelope only caused short vibration; use speed=0.56 and about 1000-1200ms for a reliable 10cm dock exit, with 0.52 as the minimum effective positive speed. The actual emotion_runtime gateway demo remains pending because OpenClaw Gateway :18789 was not listening.
